search_context.feature: Fix course import to filter cover image selection to root-folder images only via maxDepth option on scanDirectory() and two-pass scanning in courseImport.ts
searches_performed: course import, scanDirectory, maxDepth, directory scanning
cover image selection, image filtering in import
async generators, depth-limited traversal, two-pass scanning

conclusion: No matching past solutions found. The changes to src/lib/fileSystem.ts (adding maxDepth option to scanDirectory) and src/lib/courseImport.ts (two-pass scanning: first pass depth-limited for cover images, second pass recursive for videos/PDFs) represent novel work without prior institutional learnings in the solutions knowledge base. The closest tangentially-related files (audiobook cover search async timing, ABS sync cover fallback, and auto-categorize on import plan) address different modules, different problems, and different technical patterns.

files_examined.reason: About audiobook metadata cover search spinner tied to arbitrary timeout. Matched on 'cover' and 'scan' keywords but deals with timer leaks in frontend_stimulus, not filesystem directory traversal or image filtering.

Shell scripting lessons for M4B audiobook conversion pipeline on a remote server. Matched on incidental file-system-related keywords but is about bash, ffmpeg, and m4b-tool, not the File System Access API.
About pdfjs-dist version mismatch between caret dependency and react-pdf bundled version. Matched on 'getFile' in the broader scan but is about npm dependency pinning.
ABS sync deadlock guard, 429 throttle, auth guard patterns. Matched on 'cover' keyword but the cover fallback section is about Audiobookshelf cover download failures, not local file cover selection.

About course card long-press interaction pattern on ImportedCourseCompactCard. Shares the course import domain tangentially but deals with touch interaction testing patterns, not filesystem scanning or cover image filtering.
